V8uPrH1Fo6bdw9WJbQnyH4YmPAQKGE"]}},"version":1}

params._admin: The address that will have admin privileges; must not be address(0)

getStudentCredentials(address).details: Reverts if the student address is not registered. The returned array         includes both Active and Revoked credentials.

returns._0: An array of bytes32 credential IDs belonging to the student

isCredentialValid(bytes32).details: Reverts if the credential does not exist. Returns false (not a revert)         if the credential exists but has been revoked.

params.credentialId: The bytes32 credential ID to check

returns._0: True if Active, false if Revoked
True if the address is a registered issuer, false otherwise
True if the address is a registered student, false otherwise

issueCredential(string,address).details: The credential ID is derived from keccak256(studentAddress, ipfsHash,         block.timestamp, msg.sender), making it unique per issuance event.         Protected by nonReentrant and whenNotPaused.         Reverts if:           - studentAddress is zero or not registered           - the IPFS hash has already been used for a prior credential

params._ipfsHash: The IPFS CID of the off-chain credential document
params._studentAddress: The wallet address of the credential recipient

returns.credentialId: The unique bytes32 identifier for the newly issued credential

pause().details: Calls OpenZeppelin's internal _pause(); emits a Paused event.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

registerDepartment(address).details: Reverts if the address is zero or already an issuer.

params.department: The address to be registered as an authorised issuer

registerStudent(address).details: Callable by admin or any registered issuer.         Reverts if the student is already registered or address is zero.

params.student: The wallet address of the student to register

removeDepartment(address).details: Reverts if the address is not currently an issuer.

params.department: The issuer address to be removed

revokeCredential(bytes32).details: Only the admin or the department that originally issued the credential         may revoke it. Revocation is permanent; there is no un-revoke function.         Protected by whenNotPaused.

params.credentialId: The unique ID of the credential to revoke

unpause().details: Calls OpenZeppelin's internal _unpause(); emits an Unpaused event.

verifyCredentialByHash(string).details: Uses the _hashToCredentialId mapping to resolve hash → ID → struct.         Reverts if no credential has been issued for this hash.

params._ipfsHash: The IPFS CID to look up

returns._0: The Credential struct associated with the given IPFS hash

verifyCredentialById(bytes32).details: Reverts if the ID is zero or no credential exists for it.

params._credentialId: The bytes32 credential ID to look up

returns._0: The Credential struct containing all on-chain metadata

admin().notice: The administrator address; set at deployment and never changed

constructor.notice: Deploys the contract and assigns the admin role.

getStudentCredentials(address).notice: Returns all credential IDs ever issued to a given student.

isCredentialValid(bytes32).notice: Returns true if a credential exists and has an Active status.

isIssuer(address).notice: Checks whether an address holds the issuer role.

isStudent(address).notice: Checks whether an address is a registered student.

issueCredential(string,address).notice: Issues a new credential to a registered student.

pause().notice: Pauses credential issuance and revocation. Only callable by admin.

registerDepartment(address).notice: Grants the issuer role to a department address.

registerStudent(address).notice: Registers a student address so credentials can be issued to them.

removeDepartment(address).notice: Revokes the issuer role from a department address.

totalIssued().notice: Running total of all credentials ever issued (never decremented on revoke)

unpause().notice: Resumes normal operation after a pause. Only callable by admin.

verifyCredentialByHash(string).notice: Returns the full Credential struct for a given IPFS hash.

verifyCredentialById(bytes32).notice: Returns the full Credential struct for a given credential ID.
